title: KGRAG Federated Semantic Search
description: Federated semantic search across GutenbergKG (Project Gutenberg literature) and MetaboKG (KEGG metabolic pathways). Requires a pre-built Network Volume containing per-book DocKG indices.

input.name: KG Volume Path
input.description: Mount path of the Network Volume holding the pre-built GutenbergKG and MetaboKG indices. Must match the mount path set on the endpoint.

input.name: RunPod API Key
input.description: Your RunPod API key. Required only when synthesize=true to call a vLLM endpoint.

input.name: vLLM Endpoint URL
input.description: Optional RunPod vLLM endpoint base URL for answer synthesis (e.g. https://api.runpod.ai/v2/<endpoint-id>). Leave blank to disable synthesis.

input.name: vLLM Model
input.description: Model ID served by the vLLM endpoint. Must match the model deployed there.

input.name: Embedding Model
input.description: Sentence-transformer model for query embedding. Must match the model used when building the KG indices.
